query: SELECT rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(base_capture_rate) as avg_cap, SUM(is_capturable) as capturable FROM game_monster_catalog GROUP BY rarity ORDER BY FIELD(rarity, 'common', 'uncommon', 'rare', 'epic', 'legendary');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(base_capture_rate) as avg_cap, SUM(is_capturable) as capturable FROM game_monster_catalog GROUP BY rarity ORDER BY FIELD(rarity, 'common', 'uncommon', 'rare', 'epic', 'legendary');
